name: workspace
description: Algodoo tarzinda gelismis modlara sahip marble race simulasyon oyunu.

scripts.build:web: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp index.html styles.css app.js manifest.webmanifest icon.svg sw.js dist/ && if [ -d assets ]; then cp -r assets dist/; fi
scripts.sync:android: npm run build:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.build:apk: npm run sync:android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
